Recipes ⟩

Breakfast

Apple Oven Pancake

Part pancake, part popover, it puffs up high around the edges when it’s done. Serve it quickly before it sinks.

Baked Apple Cider Doughnuts

This recipe yields the classic flavor of baked cider doughnuts. For the most traditional result, a doughnut pan is recommended, but you can also bake these off in a muffin pan.

Banana Donut Holes 2-Ingredient Banana Donut Holes

These 2-Ingredient Banana Donut Holes are easy air fryer banana bread treats perfect to fix your banana bread craving in less than 15 minutes.

Blueberry Muffins Jordan Marsh’s Blueberry Muffins

In 1985, The Times published a recipe for the blueberry muffins served at the Ritz-Carlton hotel in Boston, which Marian Burros, who adapted the recipe, judged among her favorite muffins in the city.

Pancakes Good Old Fashioned Pancakes

This is a great recipe that I found in my Grandma’s recipe book. Judging from the weathered look of this recipe card, this was a family favorite.

Pannekaker

Norwegian Pannekaker (Pancakes)

Shakshuka

Shakshuka With Feta

Vafler

Norwegian Vafler (Waffles)
